query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: An abstract composition of overlapping organic forms fills the frame in shades of green, chartreuse, and pale yellow. Soft transitions flow between lighter and darker areas, with curved and vertical shapes suggesting dense plant foliage or leaves viewed closely.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract photograph of foliage rendered with extreme intentional blur and soft focus, dissolving all fine detail into smeared, mushy shapes. Lacking any clear texture or recognizable structure, the image abandons representational clarity in favor of gestural patches of green, chartreuse, and pale yellow that create a dreamlike, non-representational composition.
